title: Incrementalism Is At The Core Of Evergy's Growth Story
text: Evergy, the largest electric company in Kansas, recorded a decline in Q2 revenues and net income, but saw an increase in free cash flow. Evergy's operational strategy focuses on scalability, reliable performance, and cost-effective ESG inclusionary objectives. Despite underperformance in the stock market, Evergy demonstrates growth potential, value, and sustainable shareholder returns compared to its peers.

title: Evergy (EVRG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Evergy's (EVRG) second-quarter earnings are better than expected. Operating and maintenance expenses decreased in the reported quarter due to lower fuel and purchased power expenses.

title: Evergy Inc (EVRG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Evergy Inc (EVRG) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.81 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.79 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.86 per share a year ago.

title: Evergy Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results, Declares Quarterly Dividend and Reaffirms 2023 Guidance

title: Evergy (EVRG) to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: Evergy's (EVRG) second-quarter 2023 results are expected to benefit from higher transmission earnings and cost saving initiatives. However, higher interest expenses might have a negative impact.
